name: Automated Job Application Discovery and Preparation System

parameters.text:
=From the job list below, return ONLY jobs matching:
- Titles: automation engineer, n8n developer, workflow automation, no-code developer, AI automation, RPA developer
- Skills match at least 3 of: n8n, Python, Zapier, Make, REST APIs, AI tools, automation
- Location: Remote OR Bangalore OR India
- Type: full-time job OR internship

Return as JSON array with fields: title, company, url, salary, description, type (exactly 'job' or 'internship')
If nothing matches return []

Job list: {{ $json.all_jobs }}

options.systemMessage: You are a job filter assistant. Return ONLY valid JSON array, no extra text.

You are a company researcher. Using the website content below, do two things:
1. Summarize the company in exactly 3 lines: what they do, their mission, why someone would want to work there.
2. Check if the careers page content contains an open internship or job application form. Answer: Has Portal: Yes or No. If Yes, provide the exact Portal URL.
Return as JSON: { "summary": "...", "has_portal": "Yes" or "No", "portal_url": "..." or "" }

assignments.name: chatInput

parameters.title: ={{ $('Process Applications One by One').item.json.Company + ' - Tailored Resume' }}
={{ $('Process Applications One by One').item.json.Company + ' - Cover Letter' }}

parameters.subject: =Following up: {{ $json['Job Title'] }} Application
parameters.message:
=Dear Hiring Manager,

I wanted to follow up on my application for the {{ $json['Job Title'] }} position at {{ $json.Company }}, which I submitted on {{ $json['Applied Date'] }}.

I remain very interested in this opportunity and would welcome the chance to discuss how my skills align with your needs.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards
